## Before You File

- For usage/help questions, start with `SUPPORT.md`.
- For contribution workflow and validation expectations, see `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- If your request is actually about a security issue, do **not** file it publicly; follow `SECURITY.md` instead.

name: Feature request
about: Propose a non-breaking improvement to docs, tooling, or extraction workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
